title: eupatorium cordatum var. fraseri
intro: Eupatorium cordatum var. fraseri, also known as Mistflower or Fraser's Mistflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Eupatoriinae subfamily within the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Eupatorium cordatum var. fraseri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Eupatorium cordatum var. fraseri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and effectiveness.
